info.title: ContentFlow API
info.summary: Multi-platform social publishing and AI video generation API.
info.description:
ContentFlow exposes a unified API for multi-platform publishing, scheduled delivery, video generation, AI comment replies, content bomb distribution, and viral score prediction.

## Authentication
All endpoints require an `X-API-Key` header. Keys are prefixed with `cf_live_` (production) or `cf_test_` (sandbox).

## Rate Limiting
Requests are rate-limited per plan. See `X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`, and `X-RateLimit-Reset` response headers.

post.description: Creates up to 100 posts in a single request. Platform-specific throttle intervals are applied automatically. Use `all_or_nothing` mode to reject the entire batch on any failure, or `partial` to create as many as quota allows.
Creates a multi-platform publishing job. If `scheduled_for` is omitted the post is enqueued immediately; otherwise it is stored for later dispatch.

parameters.name: dry_run

schema.description: Validate and preview delivery wiring without enqueueing or publishing.
schema.title: Dry Run

parameters.description: Validate and preview delivery wiring without enqueueing or publishing.

schema.title: Response Create Post Api V1 Posts Post

get.description: Returns paginated publishing jobs for the authenticated owner.
Returns the current aggregate and per-platform status for a single post job.

delete.description: Cancels a pending or scheduled publishing job before it is delivered.

409.description: Action conflicts with the current resource state.

example.detail: Cannot perform action on current state

post.description: Creates an AI video generation job and enqueues it for background processing through the yt-factory generation engine.

get.description: Returns all available video templates (built-in + user custom).

post.description: Creates a user-owned custom video template.

get.description: Returns a single video template by ID (built-in or custom).
Returns the current state and output URL for a video generation job.

post.description: Creates a content bomb that expands a single topic into platform-specific variants.

get.description: Returns the transformation status and per-platform generated content for a bomb.

post.description: Queues the generated platform variants for asynchronous publication.

409.description: Action conflicts with the current resource state.

example.detail: Cannot perform action on current state

post.description: Fetch and store comments from a platform post.

schema.title: Response Collect Comments Api V1 Comments Collect Post

get.description: List collected comments with optional filters.
Retrieve a single comment by ID.

post.description: Generate an AI reply and post it to the platform.

409.description: Action conflicts with the current resource state.

example.detail: Cannot perform action on current state

post.description: Analyze content before publishing and predict its viral potential. Returns a score 0-100 with breakdown, suggestions, and A/B variants.
Automatically generate 3 variants each for title, description, and tags to enable A/B testing before publishing.
Register a recurring schedule with timezone support.

get.description: List user's schedules with optional active filter.

schema.title: Response Delete Schedule Api V1 Schedules  Schedule Id  Delete

get.description: Get platform-specific optimal posting time recommendations.

schema.title: Response Recommend Times Api V1 Schedules Recommend Get

get.description: Returns the current month's usage summary including limits for your plan.
Returns daily usage counts for the last N days (default 30).

schema.description: Number of days to look back
schema.title: Days

parameters.description: Number of days to look back

post.description: Returns an authorization URL to redirect the user for OAuth consent.

get.description: Handles the OAuth callback: exchanges the code, encrypts and stores tokens.
Returns all connected social media accounts for the authenticated owner. Use this endpoint to confirm which platforms are available for publishing.

delete.description: Removes a connected social media account and its stored tokens.

get.description: Returns aggregated analytics metrics across all platforms for the specified period (1d, 7d, 30d, 90d).
Returns counts of posts and video jobs by status.
Returns per-platform aggregated metrics for comparison.

schema.title: Response Get Platform Comparison Api V1 Analytics Platforms Get

get.description: Returns top posts ranked by the specified metric.

schema.title: Response Get Top Posts Api V1 Analytics Top Posts Get

get.description: Returns daily follower/subscriber counts by platform.

schema.title: Response Get Growth Api V1 Analytics Growth Get

get.description: Returns webhook deliveries that exhausted retries and moved to the dead-letter queue.
Returns delivery history for a single webhook.

post.description: Replays the most recent delivery payload for the specified webhook.
Creates a fresh delivery attempt from a historical delivery payload.

get.description: Returns trending topics across platforms, optionally filtered by platform, region, and category.

schema.description: Filter by platform: youtube, reddit, google_trends
schema.title: Platform

parameters.description: Filter by platform: youtube, reddit, google_trends

get.description: Aggregates trends across platforms and returns scored topic recommendations with source attribution and related keywords.

post.description: Creates a video generation job or content bomb from a trending topic. If platforms are specified, creates a bomb; otherwise generates a video.
Issue a new API key with optional expiration.

get.description: Returns all API keys for the authenticated user.

post.description: Issues a new key and schedules the old one for deactivation after a 24-hour grace period.

get.description: Returns the usage audit trail for a specific API key.
Returns the authenticated user's audit trail. Supports filtering by action, resource, and date range.

tags.name: Posts
tags.description: Create, schedule, inspect, and cancel multi-platform publishing jobs.

tags.name: Videos
tags.description: Queue AI video generation workflows and inspect job status.
